articles.description: As Manchester City continue to crank up the pressure on Arsenal, Pep Guardiola tells his players to take three days off to "enjoy life" with "caipirinhas and daiquiris".
articles.title: Pep Guardiola tells team to 'enjoy life' with cocktails as Man City pile pressure on Arsenal

articles.description: Bruce Mouat's rink are unable to end a 102-year wait for a men's Winter Olympic curling gold - and vanquish their own disappointment from 2022 - as Canada deny Team GB a fourth gold medal of this year's Games.
articles.title: Winter Olympics 2026: GB curlers denied Olympic gold at death yet again

articles.description: "Everyone has to take a look at themselves" - what went wrong for England in their record Six Nations home defeat by Ireland?
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: What went wrong for England in nightmare defeat by Ireland?

articles.description: Scotland displayed a different side of their personality in the dramatic comeback victory over Wales in Cardiff, writes Tom English.
articles.title: 'Terrible beauty Scotland reverse the narrative on extraordinary day'

articles.description: Chelsea have more red cards than any side in the Premier League this season, and boss Liam Rosenior says they have "set fire" to points.
articles.title: Chelsea 1-1 Burnley: Red cards and poor home form - Blues 'set fire to points'

articles.description: Wales captain Dewi Lake feels his side lost a Six Nations game against Scotland in Cardiff that they did enough to win.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Wales loss to Scotland gut-wrenching - Dewi Lake

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Osasuna vs Real Madrid in the Spanish La Liga
articles.title: Osasuna vs Real Madrid: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his players should "be part of a different club" if they can not deal with the "noise" as his team bid to end their 22-year wait for a league title.
articles.title: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta says deal with 'noise' or join a different club

articles.description: Harry Kane scores twice as Bayern Munich move nine points clear at the top of the Bundesliga with victory over Eintracht Frankfurt at Allianz Arena.
articles.title: Kane scores two as Bayern beat Eintracht Frankfurt
